{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201654165801835F8010D207BBD5"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616590123964875544","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得作者写的很美味啊[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773378358,"group_id":"7613286617184226329","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"高山仰止 ，景行行止","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N57BhsQsyCv7qlFxFAhx7mg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ecd433e1dea644d795f8d39732503a9a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537795&x-signature=enA2JEGjbvAoDA7tnEgCJT9Fcf8%3D","user_id":"100022794131","user_name":"源子yyy"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100022794131","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7613286617184226329","book_info":{"abstract":"陈诺，24岁，网吧网管，负债八万，房租拖欠半个月，泡面只敢买袋装的。
人生最大的指望，是下个月工资别扣完。
直到那天凌晨，他打完一把《无畏契约》，屏幕上弹出一个按钮——
「可抽」
灰色卡：捷风熟练度·圆满。一局游戏，他从路人王变成人形外挂。
金色卡：现金·5000元。口袋里的钞票，热乎的，真钱。
后来他发现，这游戏掉卡，但一局最多掉一张，通常不掉。打完才知道颜色，抽到什么是命。
灰色：游戏天赋拉满，全英雄熟练度、步枪专精、身法圆满——他能打职业了。
蓝色：现实才艺觉醒，钢琴、绘画、外语、厨艺——他突然什么都会了。
金色：现金到账，小到一千，大到十万——债，能还了。
......
陈诺本来只想还完债，安安静静过日子。
但系统不答应。
有人也不答应。
——
“我就想打个游戏，怎么打着打着，全世界都来找我了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f6f1123430a24891646c0b3adfc4ff53~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"源子yyy","author_id":"","book_id":"7613286617184226329","book_name":"抽卡成神：从无畏契约开始暴富","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8a8b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2542人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":509,"name":"游戏主播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=509&name=游戏主播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7613286711027565081","read_count":"2542","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"190909"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"68","tags":"游戏体育,电竞,体育,系统,直播,游戏主播,升级流,卡牌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f6f1123430a24891646c0b3adfc4ff53~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180856&x-signature=2427WmzlxPYsIaY1QxGhuzJ8mss%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100022794131","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_
